title: RBI Revocation of NBFC Registrations - Major Crackdown
description: <cite index="47-1,47-3,47-4">The Reserve Bank of India revoked the registration or license of 135 NBFCs across the country, intended towards enhancing regulatory oversight, ensuring financial transparency, thwarting fraudulent practices and strengthening compliance with the regulatory framework.</cite> <cite index="47-5">Of these 135 NBFCs, 125 of them were from the state of West Bengal, whose licenses were cancelled for regulatory violations and indulging in financial misadventure.</cite>
